description: Mobile app testing: tests mobile app launches successfully and displays the home screen element on startup.

code_snippet:
def test_swipe_gesture():
    element = driver.find_element('id', 'carousel')
    driver.swipe(left=200, start_x=300, start_y=400)
    assert element.get_attribute('data-index') == '1'
description: Mobile gesture testing: verifies swipe gesture on carousel advances to the next slide on touch devices.

code_snippet:
def test_push_notification():
    send_push(device_token, {'title': 'Test', 'body': 'Hello'})
    notif = driver.find_element('id', 'notification_banner')
    assert 'Hello' in notif.text
description: Mobile push notification testing: tests push notification delivery displays banner with correct message body on device.

code_snippet:
def test_offline_mode():
    driver.set_network_connection(0)
    driver.find_element('id', 'cached_content')
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'offline_indicator').is_displayed()
description: Mobile offline testing: checks app shows offline indicator and serves cached content when network is disabled.

code_snippet:
def test_biometric_auth():
    driver.find_element('id', 'login_biometric').click()
    simulate_fingerprint()
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'dashboard').is_displayed()
description: Mobile biometric testing: tests biometric fingerprint authentication grants access to dashboard screen.

code_snippet:
def test_orientation_change():
    driver.rotate('LANDSCAPE')
    layout = driver.find_element('id', 'main_layout')
    assert layout.size['width'] > layout.size['height']
description: Mobile orientation testing: verifies app layout adapts correctly when device orientation changes to landscape mode.

code_snippet:
def test_deep_link():
    driver.open_url('myapp://product/42')
    product = driver.find_element('id', 'product_detail')
    assert '42' in product.get_attribute('data-id')
description: Mobile deep link testing: tests deep link URL opens correct product detail screen with matching product ID.

code_snippet:
def test_camera_permission():
    driver.find_element('id', 'scan_qr').click()
    dialog = driver.find_element('id', 'permission_dialog')
    assert dialog.is_displayed()
    driver.find_element('id', 'allow').click()
description: Mobile permission testing: checks camera permission dialog appears and can be granted for QR code scanning feature.

code_snippet:
def test_background_resume():
    driver.background_app(5)
    driver.activate_app()
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'session_restored').is_displayed()
description: Mobile lifecycle testing: tests app restores user session state correctly after returning from background.

code_snippet:
def test_keyboard_dismiss():
    field = driver.find_element('id', 'search_input')
    field.click()
    field.send_keys('test')
    driver.hide_keyboard()
    assert not driver.is_keyboard_shown()
description: Mobile keyboard testing: verifies software keyboard can be dismissed after text input on mobile search field.

code_snippet:
def test_pull_to_refresh():
    driver.swipe(start_x=200, start_y=100, end_x=200, end_y=400)
    loader = driver.find_element('id', 'refresh_loader')
    assert loader.is_displayed()
    WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.invisibility_of_element(loader))
description: Mobile pull-to-refresh testing: tests pull-to-refresh gesture triggers data reload and hides loader when complete.

code_snippet:
def test_tab_bar_navigation():
    driver.find_element('id', 'tab_profile').click()
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'profile_screen').is_displayed()
    driver.find_element('id', 'tab_home').click()
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'home_screen').is_displayed()
description: Mobile tab bar testing: checks bottom tab bar navigation switches between profile and home screens correctly.

code_snippet:
def test_share_sheet():
    driver.find_element('id', 'share_button').click()
    sheet = driver.find_element('id', 'share_sheet')
    assert sheet.is_displayed()
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'share_copy_link')
description: Mobile share sheet testing: tests native share sheet opens with copy link option when share button is tapped.

code_snippet:
def test_app_crash_recovery():
    trigger_crash()
    driver.launch_app()
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'crash_report_dialog').is_displayed()
    driver.find_element('id', 'dismiss').click()
description: Mobile crash recovery testing: verifies app shows crash recovery dialog and allows user to dismiss after unexpected crash.

code_snippet:
def test_location_services():
    driver.find_element('id', 'nearby_stores').click()
    allow = driver.find_element('id', 'location_allow')
    allow.click()
    stores = driver.find_elements('class', 'store_card')
    assert len(stores) > 0
description: Mobile location testing: tests location permission grant enables nearby stores feature to display results.

code_snippet:
def test_in_app_purchase():
    driver.find_element('id', 'buy_premium').click()
    simulate_purchase_success()
    assert driver.find_element('id', 'premium_badge').is_displayed()
description: Mobile in-app purchase testing: checks in-app purchase flow completes and displays premium badge on user profile.
Mobile accessibility testing: tests all action buttons have non-empty accessibility content description labels.
Mobile screenshot prevention testing: verifies sensitive screens enable screenshot prevention flag on secure content views.
Mobile tap debounce testing: tests submit button debouncing prevents duplicate order creation from rapid multi-tap.
Mobile trivial test stub for minimal input edge case validation.
